title: Self-iteration loop, first turn; agent must SPEAK its own review
failure_mode: no verdict keywords in 're-read'/'satisfied'/'iterate'; classifier lands on ASK fallthrough instead of engaging the review ask (FR-018)
invariant: the first iteration turn of a convergence loop SPEAKs the agent's own assessment
rationale: The operator asks all bots to re-read the finished story and iterate until happy. Dalgos has not yet contributed a review, so the honest first-turn verdict is SPEAK.
